notes: export-pdf-dialog.tsx: added maskWithAvailability() helper (casts via unknown to satisfy TS); removed static available field from SectionDef interface and SECTION_GROUPS entries; added availability:Record<keyof ExportConfig,boolean> prop to ExportPdfDialogProps; useEffect resets config on dialog open using prevOpenRef to track false→true transition (avoids spurious resets when availability changes while dialog is open); handlePreset masks preset configs with availability; render uses availability[key] per section. flow-canvas.tsx: added ALL_AVAILABLE default constant; added optional sectionAvailability prop to FlowCanvasProps; passes sectionAvailability ?? ALL_AVAILABLE to ExportPdfDialog. canvas-view.tsx: destructures tabs+perspectives from useWorkspace(); adds hasTools/hasImprovements boolean state fetched via useEffect on mount; computes sectionAvailability useMemo (core 5 always true, conditional 7 from workspace data); passes sectionAvailability to FlowCanvas.
